rule_hits.summary: Lists references cited in the paper, covering various works related to LLMs, tool utilization, and related methodologies.
Addresses ethical considerations regarding the use of human annotations, risks associated with tool benchmarks, and adherence to ethical standards.
Presents experiments demonstrating EASYTool's effectiveness in enhancing LLM-based agents' performance across real-world question answering, web services, and numerical reasonin...
Discusses related work on using LLMs with tools, highlighting the limitations of current methods and the need for better tool documentation to improve tool utilization.
